questions.question: Who fathered Jeconiah and his brothers during the Babylon exile?
questions.answers: Josiah (Ἰωσίας) fathered Jeconiah (Ἰεχονίαν) and his brothers.

questions.question: Where/under what circumstance were Jeconiah and his brothers born?
questions.answers: They were born during the time of the migration/exile to Babylon (μετοικεσίας Βαβυλῶνος).
